mapper.sql: id, question_type, content, difficulty, status, major_id, course_id, chapter_id, analysis, knowledge_points, answer, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_question WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_question (question_type, content, difficulty, status, major_id, course_id, chapter_id, analysis, knowledge_points, answer, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{questionType}, #{content}, #{difficulty}, #{status}, #{majorId}, #{courseId}, #{chapterId}, #{analysis}, #{knowledgePoints}, #{answer}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE edu_question SET question_type = #{questionType}, content = #{content}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, status = #{status}, major_id = #{majorId}, course_id = #{courseId}, chapter_id = #{chapterId}, analysis = #{analysis}, knowledge_points = #{knowledgePoints}, answer = #{answer}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE edu_question SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_question SET deleted = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE edu_question SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM edu_question WHERE deleted = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM edu_question WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 1
